name: recoil_app_intro_fmv_state_scalar_deleting_destructor
description: RecoilApp_IntroFmvState::ScalarDeletingDestructor runs the intro FMV state destructor, conditionally frees this when bit 0 of flags is set, and returns this.
known_limits: Binary-safe verification is accepted by the recoil_app_fmv_state_scalar_deleting_destructors VC target.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly and decompilation for 0x42e0d0 validate the intro FMV destructor call, flags bit-0 delete branch, returned self pointer, and thiscall callee cleanup for the flags argument.
The native smoke verifies the deleting heap path returns the original RecoilApp_IntroFmvState this pointer.
